description: For generating marketing briefs, campaign briefs, and one-pagers — focused, actionable, ready to hand to a team.
toneDescription: Focused and purposeful. Every word justifies the campaign spend. Clarity over creativity in a brief.

clarifyingQuestions.question: What is the primary objective of this campaign or marketing effort?
Who is the target audience? Include demographics and psychographics if known.
What is the budget range and timeline for this campaign?

author: prodeck-builtin
